description_long: This object is a collection of tall, rectangular office buildings arranged in a dense urban cluster, reminiscent of a modern city skyline. The buildings feature sleek, dark facades with a grid of illuminated windows, suggesting active office spaces within. Several towers are topped with antenna spires, adding to their vertical emphasis and hinting at telecommunications infrastructure. The structures vary in height and width, but all share a consistent architectural language of straight lines and sharp corners. The window patterns are highly regular, forming horizontal and vertical bands across the exteriors. The overall appearance is distinctly contemporary, with a focus on glass and steel materials and minimal decorative elements.
description: A cluster of modern, high-rise office buildings with dark facades, illuminated windows, and antenna spires, forming a dense urban skyline.
description_view_0: A frontal view showing the full array of office towers, highlighting their varying heights, illuminated windows, and prominent antenna spires.
description_view_1: A side view revealing the narrow profiles of the buildings and the depth of the cluster, with antenna spires visible on the tallest structures.
description_view_2: A rear view similar to the front, displaying the regular window patterns and the overall density of the building arrangement.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, emphasizing the slimness of the towers and the alignment of the buildings in rows.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows in horizontal and vertical bands across all facades.
